inputs.description:
Read docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-28-auth-plan-a-core.md — Task 7. Create tests/app/test_auth.py with tests for: login success, login wrong password, guest session, /me endpoint, /me without auth, admin list users, non-admin cannot list users. Use tmp_path + monkeypatch to isolate auth DB. Use EXACT test code from plan.

Run: poetry run pytest tests/app/test_auth.py -v
All tests must pass.

Commit and push: git add tests/app/test_auth.py && git commit -m "feat: add auth endpoint tests" && git push origin feature/auth-security
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run pytest tests/app/test_auth.py -v 2>&1 | tail -15
